channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump kicks off a Pennsylvania rally by talking about Arnold Palmer's genitalia
item.description: LATROBE, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump's campaign suggested he would begin previewing his closing argument Saturday night with Election Day barely two weeks away.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US investigating unauthorized release of classified documents on Israel attack plans
item.description: The U.S. is investigating an unauthorized release of classified documents that assess Israel’s plans to attack Iran and note that Israel continues to move military assets in place to conduct a military strike in response to Iran’s blistering ballistic missile attack on Oct. 1.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Mike Balsalmo, Eric Tucker And Tara Copp, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Harris makes last-ditch appeal to disenchanted Republicans
item.description: Vice President Harris and her allies are making a last-ditch effort to peel off Republican support from former President Trump in the final days of the election.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Harris courts voters in Atlanta with musical guest Usher
item.description: Singer Usher will also be in attendance. The vice president also campaigned earlier Saturday in Detroit alongside "Good as Hell" singer Lizzo.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: GOP-leaning polls trigger questions about accuracy
item.description: The prevalence of Republican-leaning polls in recent weeks is raising questions about their effect on the overall polling average as the presidential race between Vice President Harris and former President Trump tightens even further.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fetterman issues warning to Democrats after Elon stumps for Trump in Pennsylvania
item.description: Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman told the New York Post in an interview that Elon Musk's endorsement of former President Trump is "a concern" in the Keystone State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Together they've been in office more than 70 years. Now their races could help swing House control
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — One is the longest-serving woman in congressional history. The other is dean of the Republican delegation from California and the chairman of a subcommittee responsible for Pentagon spending. Together, they have more than seven decades of experience serving in Congress.
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris eyes a rural Maine congressional district in a hunt for every possible electoral vote
item.description: LEWISTON, Maine (AP) — Rob Rogers has seen his rural corner of New England turn into a stronghold for Donald Trump in two consecutive elections. But this year he's feeling hopeful that Vice President Kamala Harris could reclaim a potentially decisive electoral vote for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Exclusive: Chauncey Parker talks new role as NYC deputy mayor for public safety
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Mayor Eric Adams on Tuesday appointed Chauncey Parker to be New York City’s new deputy mayor for public safety. Parker takes over the position that was held by Philip Banks, who resigned the week prior.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11

item.title: Fox News Politics: Crunch time for Harris
item.description: Get the latest updates from the 2024 campaign trail, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kentucky Tiktok suit says company considered using KY creators to sway Sen. Mitch McConnell
item.description: The suit says videos by Kentucky small businesses were identified as possibly of interest to the senator, who has expressed concern about the app's effect on kids
item.dc:creator: Sylvia Goodman, MPR News

item.title: Harris barnstorms battleground Michigan
item.description: Vice President Harris is barnstorming the battleground of Michigan on Friday with three campaign stops in a "blue wall" state that is critical to victory on Election Day and in a place where polls show the race on a razor's edge.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump tells child there will be no cows under Harris
item.description: Former President Donald Trump joined Fox and Friends on Friday for an in-person interview where he told a 6-year-old child that the U.S. “won’t have any cows” if Vice President Kamala Harris is elected.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bret Baier says he made 'a mistake' during Harris interview
item.description: Fox News anchor Bret Baier said former President Donald Trump's comments about "the enemy within" was mistakenly absent from a clip shown.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: AI-generated images have become a new form of propaganda this election season
item.description: This election cycle, AI-generated images have proliferated on social media platforms after politically charged news events. They often spread partisan narratives rather than facts.
item.dc:creator: Huo Jingnan, MPR News

item.title: 3 states renew efforts to limit abortion pill access
item.description: The lawsuit was filed in a Texas federal court Friday, roughly four months after the Supreme Court decided against undoing changes to the FDA’s regulations on the abortion pill that expanded access — such as allowing it to be mailed without an in-person doctor’s visit.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, Fox 5

item.title: What to know about absentee, mail-in, and early voting
item.description: Various forms of casting election ballots have changed since the COVID-19 pandemic affected in-person turnout and voting
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: 25 Pinellas County voting locations change after hurricanes
item.description: Twenty-five polling locations in Pinellas County have been changed due to hurricanes Helene and Milton, according to the county supervisor of elections.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: McConnell privately slammed Trump as ‘stupid’ and ‘despicable’ after 2020 election
item.description: McConnell also criticized the former president as a “narcissist” and admitted after the 2020 election that “it’s not just the Democrats who are counting the days” until he left office.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: 5 takeaways from the last full fundraising quarter before Election Day
item.description: Federal candidates have submitted their reports for what was the final full fundraising quarter before Election Day, offering a snapshot of their financial status with just three weeks to go.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, NewsNation

item.title: Trump tried a friendlier pitch with Latino voters at a Univision town hall
item.description: During a town hall outside Miami, Trump touted his record on the economy, yet called Jan. 6 a "day of love" and would not back off false claims about Haitian migrants eating pets in Springfield, Ohio.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez, MPR News

item.title: Harris interview on Fox gets testy — but also gives her a do-over
item.description: The interview was the vice president's first formal sit-down with Fox. She faced questions on immigration, and was given a chance to answer again what she would do differently from President Biden.
item.dc:creator: Tamara Keith, MPR News

item.title: Ag leaders voice concerns over negative impacts of tariffs proposed in presidential election
item.description: Midwestern agricultural leaders say they are concerned new tariffs being suggested by former President Donald Trump as part of his reelection bid could result in a damaging trade war. They say it could cost the corn and soybeans billions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News

item.title: Mayor Johnson's chief of staff says school CEO and board kept 5th Floor in the dark
item.description: In an exclusive sitdown, Cristina Pacione-Zayas invited WGN to City Hall’s 5th floor to, in her words, “clear the air.
item.dc:creator: Tahman Bradley, WGN 9
